title: leptostigma pilosum
intro: Leptostigma pilosum is a plant species native to the Western Ghats of India, belonging to the family Rubiaceae and commonly known as "Indian Long Pepper". It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leptostigma pilosum include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. Leptostigma pilosum is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment.
